title: Occam Advisors
html:
Occam Advisors

Stub. Portland-based investment advisory firm where Yahir interned summer 2023 (between OSU sophomore and junior years). Cited as the project-management / ClickUp / pipeline credential across cover letters and the 2023 year recap ("started internship in portland... fully in the swing of the internship... went to DC for internship"). Operates as Yahir's go-to "I worked in finance" credential.
